title: struthiopteris dentata
intro: Struthiopteris dentata, also known as the toothed strap fern, is a type of fern native to the tropical and subtropical regions of the world. The plant is primarily used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Struthiopteris dentata include reducing fever and alleviating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma. The herbal preparations of this plant include tea and infusions, which are made by steeping the leaves in hot water, and are typically consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
